minds.title: Medical Device Development - CardioMonitor X1
minds.creator: pm@example.com
minds.description: Development of CardioMonitor X1 wearable cardiac monitoring device per IEC 62304 / ISO 13485

minds.title: MedTech Solutions GmbH
minds.creator: admin@example.com
minds.description: Medical device manufacturer specializing in cardiac monitoring

minds.title: Dr. Sarah Chen - Systems Engineer Lead
minds.creator: admin@example.com
minds.description: Lead systems engineer with 12 years medical device experience

minds.title: Anna Mueller - QA Lead
minds.creator: admin@example.com
minds.description: Quality assurance lead, ISO 14971 risk management expert

minds.title: Requirements Engineering
minds.creator: pm@example.com
minds.description: Gather and document user needs and design inputs

minds.title: Capture User Needs
minds.creator: eng-lead@example.com
minds.description: Interview stakeholders and document user needs

minds.title: Define Design Inputs
minds.creator: eng-lead@example.com
minds.description: Translate user needs into measurable design inputs per ISO 13485

minds.title: Risk Analysis (ISO 14971)
minds.creator: eng-lead@example.com
minds.description: Perform preliminary hazard analysis and risk assessment

minds.title: Software Architecture Document
minds.creator: dev-lead@example.com
minds.description: Create IEC 62304 compliant software architecture document

minds.title: Firmware Development
minds.creator: dev-lead@example.com
minds.description: Develop embedded firmware for sensor data acquisition

minds.title: Application Software Development
minds.creator: dev-lead@example.com
minds.description: Develop mobile companion app for data visualization

minds.title: Unit Testing
minds.creator: dev-lead@example.com
minds.description: Write and execute unit tests for all software modules

minds.title: Integration Testing
minds.creator: qa-lead@example.com
minds.description: System integration testing of firmware + app + hardware

minds.title: Design Review Gate
minds.creator: pm@example.com
minds.description: Formal design review milestone per ISO 13485 clause 7.3.5

minds.title: Design Validation Complete
minds.creator: pm@example.com
minds.description: Design validation milestone - confirms device meets user needs

minds.title: Sprint 1 - Requirements & Architecture
minds.creator: pm@example.com
minds.description: First sprint covering requirements capture and architecture

type_specific_attributes.goal: Complete user needs capture and initial architecture

minds.title: Design Input Documentation
minds.creator: eng-lead@example.com
minds.description: Documenting design inputs from user needs

minds.title: Project Kickoff Complete
minds.creator: pm@example.com
minds.description: Project kickoff meeting held. All stakeholders aligned on scope and timeline. Key risk: sensor supplier lead time may impact schedule.

minds.title: Risk Analysis Finding - Battery Safety
minds.creator: qa-lead@example.com
minds.description: Preliminary hazard analysis identified battery thermal runaway as high-severity risk. Mitigation: add thermal cutoff circuit. Requires additional design input.
